title: Podgorica, Podgorica — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

content:
Overview

Podgorica is a city in Podgorica with a population of 187,000. The capital and largest city of Montenegro, a modern city at the confluence of the Morača and Ribnica rivers, known for its parks, Millennium Bridge, and vibrant café culture.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
